sn_aia_usecase.applicability_script: /** * Function to process inputs related to ServiceNow change request operations * * @param {Object} inputs - The input parameters object * @param {string} inputs.objective - The purpose or goal of the operation * @param {string} inputs.execution_plan_id - Unique identifier for the execution plan * @param {Object} inputs.context - Context information about the ServiceNow change request * @param {string} inputs.context.url - The URL of the change request in Service Operations Workspace * @param {string} inputs.context.table - The ServiceNow table name (e.g., 'change_request') * @param {string} inputs.context.record_sys_id - The sys ID of the record * @param {string} inputs.context.route - The route type (e.g., 'record') * @param {string} inputs.context.additional_context - Additional contextual information in JSON format * @param {string} inputs.context.experience - The UI experience name (e.g., 'Service Operations Workspace') * @param {string} inputs.context.number - The request number * @param {string} inputs.context.portal - The portal ID * @param {string} inputs.context.device_type - The device type from which the experience is accessed, e.g.'mweb' * @param {string} inputs.context.deployment_id - The unique identifier for the assistant deployment * @param {string} inputs.context.assistant_type - The type of assistant, e.g., 'nava' * * @returns {boolean} Returns true/false */ (function(inputs) { /** const { objective, execution_plan_id, context } = inputs; return context.table == 'incident' ; */ return false; })(inputs);
sn_aia_usecase.base_plan: Expertise: This workflow specializes in presenting comprehensive sales compensation and performance data in an accessible format. 1. Retrieve and display detailed payout information, including incentives, commissions, bonuses, adjustments, and total earnings, with clear explanations. 2. Present assigned sales quota details, including target values, time periods, and allocation specifics. 3. Provide an overview of the user's compensation plan, covering eligibility, incentive structure, performance metrics, and payout rules. 4. Identify and display the user's associated business unit for organizational context. 5. Generate a consolidated summary for a selected fiscal period, including business unit, quota, compensation plan, and payout details. 6. Notify users if commission data is unavailable for a selected or future period, advising them to check back later.
sn_aia_usecase.context_processing_script: /* * Available Variables: * * - user_utterance: The user input or message that initiated the use case. * This represents the user's natural language query or command * received during the conversation. * * - usecase_id: The unique identifier of the use case being executed. * Can be used to reference use case configurations, metadata, * or to apply specific context-handling logic. * * - context: An object containing contextual information for the use case. * It always includes a "pageContext" and may include a "triggerContext", * depending on how and from where the use case was invoked. * * Behavior by invocation type: * --------------------------------- * - When invoked via the startAiAgentConversation API: * If a "contextMemory" parameter is passed in the API request, * it will be available as the "triggerContext". * The "pageContext" is always present in this call, * regardless of the invocation type (standalone or workflow-based). * Example: * { * pageContext: { ... }, * triggerContext: { ... } // Derived from contextMemory (if passed) * } * * - When invoked as part of a workflow or chained use case: * The "pageContext" and "triggerContext" available here may represent * the state carried forward from a previous execution step. * This script can modify, enrich, or restructure these contexts * before passing them to the downstream agent(s). * * - When executed directly (standalone use case execution): * The "pageContext" will always be available (even if empty), * and "triggerContext" will only be populated if explicitly * provided through the API call. * * Return Format: * ---------------- * This script must return an updated context object to be passed to * the next stage (typically the agent or workflow step): * { pageContext: {}, triggerContext: {} } * * Example: * ---------------- * return { * pageContext: { * ...context.pageContext, * usecaseProcessed: true * }, * triggerContext: { * ...context.triggerContext, * lastModifiedBy: "usecase_context_script" * } * }; */ (function(user_utterance, usecase_id, context) { return { pageContext: context?.pageContext, triggerContext: context?.triggerContext }; })(user_utterance, usecase_id, context);
sn_aia_usecase.description: This workflow enables users to access and understand their sales performance, compensation structure, and earnings. It provides detailed payout breakdowns, quota information, compensation plan details, and business unit alignment. Designed for sales professionals seeking a clear and consolidated view of their compensation and performance metrics.
sn_aia_usecase.name: Sales Compensation Overview
